title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone doing homework. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A teenage boy is doing his homework at a desk in his bedroom. He is writing in a notebook and using a laptop. There are books, pens and a school bag on the desk.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing basketball. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Four young people are playing basketball on an outdoor court. One girl is holding the ball while another player is trying to stop her. There is a basket, a fence and trees behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
